name: agent-plus-meta
description: The meta plugin for the agent-plus framework. Workspace bootstrap, env-var readiness, identity cache, marketplace lifecycle (install/list/update/remove/search/prefer), extensions. One call to `init` creates `.agent-plus/`; `envcheck` reports which sibling-plugin env vars are set (names only); `refresh` resolves project IDs and service handles into a per-workspace cache. Day-one context for free.
